Title: Branch‑Avoidant Programming
Description: With modern CPUs, avoiding branch mispredictions is a key method for speeding up programs. One of the most effective ways to reduce mispredictions is to simply avoid branches.

Title: How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
Description: How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
